title: Chandogya 3.14: Tat Tvam Asi (You Are That)
description: From the Chandogya 3.14 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Chandogya 3.14 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: All this is Brahman. From Brahman it comes forth. Into Brahman it returns. By Brahman it lives. He who knows this, his soul is Brahman. As large as the universe is, so large is the space within the heart of man.
